title: 破釜沉舟
meaning: 比喻下定决心，不留退路

scenes.title: 砸破锅碗
scenes.prompt: An army breaking their cooking pots, cartoon style, war preparation
scenes.narration: 将军命令砸破锅碗，表示决一死战。

scenes.title: 沉没船只
scenes.prompt: An army sinking their boats at the river, cartoon style, determined soldiers
scenes.narration: 又把船只沉入河中，断绝退路。

scenes.title: 英勇胜利
scenes.prompt: An army winning a great battle, cartoon style, victory celebration
scenes.narration: 士兵们奋勇作战，最终取得了胜利。
